common.somethingWentWrong: Eitthvað fór úrskeiðis. Prufaðu að endurræsa síðuna eða komdu aftur síðar.

product.logInToAdd: Please log in to add to cart

cart.title: Cart
cart.addedToCart: Product has been added to cart

checkout.fakePaymentBody: No real transaction will take place. Do not enter real card details. This checkout is for demonstration purposes only.
checkout.errorEmptyFields: Please fill in all card fields.
checkout.errorEmptyCart: Your cart is empty or you are not signed in.
checkout.errorOrderFailed: Something went wrong placing your order. Please try again.

orderConfirmation.successBody: Thank you for your fake purchase! Your order is being pretend-processed and we will take our sweet time.

auth.loginDescription: Enter your email below to login to your account
auth.signUpSuccessBody: You've successfully signed up. Please check your email to confirm your account before signing in.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Type in your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password
auth.resetSentBody: If you registered using your email and password, you will receive a password reset email.

account.customOrdersComingSoon: Feature coming soon: Fill in form to submit custom orders or request restock of item in shop.
account.nameUpdateFailed: Failed to update name. Please try again.
account.newPasswordDescription: Please enter your new password below.
